currentObjective: U3+U8+U7 — Tabbed parent dashboard: Students | Progress | Rewards | Account tabs, diagnostic badge on child card, rewards consolidated into dashboard tab.

product.problemStatement: The parent dashboard is a single flat page. Rewards live on a dead-end /rewards URL that most parents never find. The diagnostic placement test ran but there is no visual indicator that a child still needs it. Parents have no structured navigation — everything is buried in one scroll.
product.user: Parent — managing 1-3 children aged 5-14, checking in daily on learning progress, occasionally adjusting settings or managing subscription.
useCases: Parent opens dashboard and sees four clear tabs: Students, Progress, Rewards, Account
Parent sees a 'Diagnostic pending' badge on a child card if diagnosticComplete is false
Parent clicks Rewards tab and sees the full rewards view without navigating away
Parent clicks Account tab and sees subscription status, billing button, sign-out
Child card retains all existing stats (streak, stars, coins, difficulty bars)
nfrs: Tab switch must feel instant — no full page reload, client-side state only
Active tab persists in URL query param (?tab=rewards) so deep-linking works
Mobile-first — tabs must work on small screens (horizontal scroll or compact labels)
No new API calls needed for this chunk — all data already loaded on dashboard
acceptanceCriteria: Dashboard renders with 4 tabs: Students, Progress, Rewards, Account
Students tab shows existing child profile cards unchanged
Rewards tab shows the same content currently at /rewards/page.tsx (inline, not redirect)
Account tab shows subscription banner + manage billing button + sign out
Child card shows amber 'Diagnostic pending' badge when child.diagnosticComplete === false
?tab= query param updates on tab change and restores active tab on reload
New Suite 13 tests cover: tab navigation, diagnostic badge visibility, rewards tab content
antiScope: Do NOT build the Progress tab data yet — that needs /api/progress/topics (U1+U2, next chunk)
Do NOT change /rewards/page.tsx URL — it can stay, just also render inline on dashboard
Do NOT add any new API endpoints in this chunk

codexTasks: Refactor app/dashboard/page.tsx — add tab state, tab bar component (Students | Progress | Rewards | Account)
Students tab: move existing child profile grid into Students tab content
Rewards tab: import and render rewards content inline (reuse lib/services, not page redirect)
Account tab: move subscription banner + manage billing + sign-out into Account tab
Progress tab: render placeholder 'Coming soon' — data layer built in next chunk
Child card: add amber badge 'Diagnostic pending' when child.diagnosticComplete === false
Wire ?tab= query param to active tab state (useSearchParams)
claudeTasks: Write Suite 13 — tab navigation tests, diagnostic badge, rewards tab, account tab content
Verify all 136 existing tests still pass after dashboard refactor
Security check — no new data exposed in tab views that wasn't already accessible

mergePolicy: No merge without explicit user approval.

workstreams.goal: Scaffold the shared `.agents` contract, scripts, and docs so both agents can poll and talk through the repo.
chunks: Create task, ownership, status, handoff, and message templates
Add helper scripts for status, polling, and messages
Wire package scripts and README guidance
Publish the Claude prompt and branch split

workstreams.goal: Add a LangGraph orchestration plan and map product/test/security/housekeeping roles onto the repo-native contract.

coordinationRules: Read the shared task, ownership, status, handoff, and message files before starting new work.
Poll the other agent every 5 seconds while actively working.
Update your own status every 30-60 seconds and on every blocker change.
Keep write scopes disjoint unless the task explicitly says otherwise.
Product owns requirements quality, use cases, and non-functional expectations before implementation starts.
